text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, December 15. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Checking on some house maintenance items. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I've indexed the research notes. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Prepping school lunches for the week. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the grocery list ready. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Let's get that resolved. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted the plans. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan's team played a match and won 1-0! The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! That's a big step. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Meal planning saves so much time. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
